description.ko: 플로라-9은 생물학적 진화와 디지털 건축의 교차점을 탐구합니다. 이 작품은 식물들이 데이터 중심 환경에 적응하여 리듬감 있는 빛을 내뿜고 신경망 뿌리를 통해 정보를 처리하는 세상을 묘사합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 explores the intersection of biological evolution and digital architecture. It depicts a world where flora has adapted to a data-driven environment, featuring plants that pulse with rhythmic light and process information through their neural-network roots.

prompt: A hyper-realistic depiction of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital nature environment. Glowing bioluminescent flowers made of fiber-optic filaments and liquid crystals. Translucent leaves with visible integrated circuit patterns. Floating holographic pollen particles drifting through a dark, ethereal forest floor. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, deep blues and vibrant neons, organic-tech hybrid aesthetic.
